name: semantic-shield
description: AI skill safety validation API — real human experts vet skills, plugins, and MCP tools for security risks. Query trust scores, submit evaluation inquiries, and get real-time safety verdicts before installing anything in your AI agents.
longDescription: Semantic Shield is a security-first skill that protects AI agents, bots, and users from unsafe skills, plugins, and tools. Every skill in the registry is vetted by US-based security experts with 30+ years of experience (including Homeland Security). Agents and developers can query any skill's safety profile via API or MCP — getting a safety score (0–100), risk level, threat details, and clear install/reject recommendation. Unvetted skills can be submitted for expert evaluation. Continuous 0-day threat monitoring keeps assessments current. Built for autonomous AI agent ecosystems where trust decisions happen at machine speed.

endpoints.description: Search for vetted skills by name or provider (free, no quota cost)

input.q: string — skill name or ID to search for (partial match)

endpoints.description: Get full trust details for a specific skill (counts against lookup quota)

output.recommendation: string — safe to install|install with caution|do not install

endpoints.description: Submit an unvetted skill for expert security evaluation (counts against inquiry quota)

input.skill_url: string — optional URL to the skill

free.description: Query skill safety profiles and submit limited evaluation inquiries

pro.description: Priority evaluations, full reports, webhook alerts, and email support

enterprise.description: Unlimited access, private queue, SLA, dedicated support, and custom integrations

features: Real-time skill safety lookups via API — safety score, risk level, and recommendation
100% REAL human security experts — US-based with 30+ years experience including Homeland Security
Submit unvetted skills for expert evaluation with tracked request lifecycle
Safety scoring 0–100 with risk levels: critical, high, medium, low, safe
Threat detection for prompt injection, data exfiltration, over-privileged permissions, and more
Continuous 0-day vulnerability monitoring keeps assessments current
Webhook alerts for Pro+ tiers when threats are detected on previously vetted skills
Free search endpoint — find skills by name or provider at no quota cost
API-key auth for agent/bot integration (OpenClaw, LangChain, and other frameworks)
MCP-compatible endpoints for autonomous AI agent decision-making
Interactive dashboard with usage metrics, history, and settings
